assertions.title: Traceability page is accessible from navigation

steps.action: Open dashboard at / and inspect sidebar

steps.observed: Navigated to http://localhost:3200/traceability/ and page title is "Traceability | Bropilot"

evidence.network: Not captured (agent-browser network log returned no tracked requests in this run)

assertions.title: Empty state renders gracefully

steps.expected: Fresh project shows empty-state guidance message
steps.observed: Page shows populated matrix (33 total specs, 26 linked, 79% coverage) rather than an empty state

evidence.network: Not captured (agent-browser network log returned no tracked requests in this run)

assertions.issues: Precondition not satisfiable in assigned shared runtime: traceability data already populated before this run, and validator was not permitted to restart/reset shared services.

assertions.title: Traceability page handles empty state

steps.action: Navigate to /traceability/ before any local setup changes
steps.expected: Empty-state message appears and no JS errors
steps.observed: No JS errors, but page is already populated with existing traceability links and no empty-state message

evidence.network: Not captured (agent-browser network log returned no tracked requests in this run)

assertions.issues: Blocked by shared preloaded data (non-empty traceability matrix) and no safe in-scope reset path without impacting other validators.

assertions.title: All sidebar pages load without error

steps.expected: All pages load and produce no JS errors
steps.observed: All pages loaded, but /build/ reported browser error: "Unexpected token ':'"

evidence.network: Not captured (agent-browser network log returned no tracked requests in this run)

assertions.issues: Console error observed on /build/ violates assertion requirement of zero JavaScript errors across sidebar pages.

assertions.title: New pages appear in sidebar navigation

steps.action: Inspect sidebar links from dashboard/traceability views
steps.observed: Sidebar contains "🌐 Domain" and "📊 Traceability" links

steps.expected: Both links navigate to correct routes
steps.observed: Domain link navigated to /domain/ and Traceability link navigated back to /traceability/

evidence.network: Not captured (agent-browser network log returned no tracked requests in this run)

frictions.description: Assigned shared localhost instance already contained non-empty traceability data, which prevented direct execution of fresh-project empty-state checks.
frictions.resolution: N/A (reset/restart was out of scope and disallowed for shared services)

frictions.description: `agent-browser get text body` output for /traceability includes large inline script content, which makes message-level inspection noisy.
frictions.resolution: Used annotated screenshots plus focused summary from body text to confirm visible UI state.

blockers.description: Fresh-project precondition for empty-state assertions was not available in the shared running service context (traceability already populated).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified current traceability page state and console; did not reset/restart shared services per constraints.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-TUI-001, VAL-CROSS-062), 1 failed (VAL-CROSS-060 due to /build/ console error), and 2 blocked by shared preloaded non-empty traceability state (VAL-TUI-011, VAL-CROSS-025).
